race.comment: YEAH COPY (4) goes well for rider Boche who is yet to miss a place in four rides and has been racing very consistently of late. Has placed four from four over this course and distance and should get a soft run from the favourable draw. Plenty to like about his prospects. READY TO IGNITE (3) is a bit hit or miss but will strip fitter second-up from the break and is more than capable enough on his day. Watch for sharp improvement. BOLD CHANGE (18) has hit the top-five at his past seven outings and rarely puts in a poor one. Top-three candidate. BOLD AS BRASS (8) has placed three of four around this circuit and may earn some minor money again. MOET AT MIDNIGHT (20) next in line.
